title: Create wiki site in playground
body:
Build a wiki site in the /opt/workspace/ playground using docker-compose. Deploy any wiki platform (Wiki.js, DokuWiki, MediaWiki, or similar static wiki generator like mdwiki/dokuwiki).

Requirements:
1. Create a docker-compose.yml in /opt/workspace/wiki/
2. Make it accessible on a unique port (e.g., 12350)
3. Use auto-setup with sqlite or postgres backend
4. Include at least 3 initial pages: Home, About, Getting Started
5. Verify it's running with curl after deployment

Use compose MCP tool to deploy. Write config files and setup scripts to /opt/workspace/wiki/.
